title: pelargonium × multidentatum
intro: Pelargonium × multidentatum, also known as Mountain Rose or Red-Flowered Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Pelargonium × multidentatum include reducing stress, anxiety, and inflammation, as well as aiding in digestion and promoting better sleep. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
